serviceNotes.engine oil: W214 E 450 M256 with ISG: 15,000 km / 12 months per https://www.auto-abc.eu/Mercedes-E-klase/v5574-2013/service (Tier 2 Oil Service proxy; W214 has no auto-abc row). Rec 10,000 km severe use.
serviceNotes.dust filter: Dust filter per Mercedes-Benz W214 maintenance booklet.
serviceNotes.brake fluid: 24-month renewal per Mercedes-Benz passenger-car service manual.
serviceNotes.check brake pad thickness: Inspect each service; mild-hybrid recuperation extends pad life.
serviceNotes.spark plugs: 60,000 km / 48 months per https://www.auto-abc.eu/Mercedes-E-klase/v5574-2013/service (Tier 2 six-cylinder spark reference).
serviceNotes.coolant: 150,000 km / 60 months — Mercedes-Benz W214 M256 service manual maintenance table (long-life engine coolant + 5-year time cap).
serviceNotes.intake carbon clean: Direct-injection turbo I6: intake cleaning ~120,000 km if symptoms.

serviceSources.engine oil: https://www.auto-abc.eu/Mercedes-E-klase/v5574-2013/service — 15,000 km / 12 months (Tier 2 proxy; W214 M256 — auto-abc has no 2024 service page)
serviceSources.dust filter: Cabin dust filter 30,000 km / 24 months — Mercedes-Benz W214; https://www.auto-abc.eu/Mercedes-E-klase/v5574-2013/service
serviceSources.engine air filter: Changed from 60,000 km / 48 months to 15,000 km per https://www.auto-abc.eu/Mercedes-E-klase/v5574-2013/service
serviceSources.brake fluid: Brake fluid renewal every 24 months (time-based, DOT 4+); Mercedes-Benz passenger-car service manual — W214
serviceSources.check brake pad thickness: Brake pad thickness check ~30,000 km — Mercedes-Benz W214 inspection schedule (wear item; interval approximate)
serviceSources.coolant: 150,000 km / 60 months — Mercedes-Benz W214 M256 service manual maintenance table (engine coolant)
serviceSources.transfer case oil: 4MATIC transfer case oil ~60,000 km preventive — specialist practice
serviceSources.front axle differential oil: 4MATIC front axle differential ~60,000 km preventive — specialist practice
serviceSources.rear axle differential oil: Rear differential oil ~60,000 km preventive — specialist practice
serviceSources.intake carbon clean: Direct-injection turbo M256 — intake cleaning ~120,000 km when symptoms warrant — specialist practice
